sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n21540" key="galou=xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γᾰλ-οῦχος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n21540.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wet-nurse</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:89" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.89</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.13</biblScope></bibl>. (Later forms for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γαλακτ-</foreign>.)</sense> </entryFree>
